title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents do not diminish the engineering craft but instead elevate it to the system design layer. Engineers apply existing principles like decomposition, separation of concerns, and state management when designing agentic systems rather than writing code directly.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift the engineering craft upward to the system design layer rather than eroding it. The talk covers how established principles, including decomposition, separation of concerns, state management, and context management, carry over to designing agentic systems instead of writing code directly. The takeaway is that engineers remain central by applying these existing design skills to orchestrate agents.
